conversation.text: hey Sarah, saw you're in property. interesting space right now, loads going on with how agencies handle enquiries. what kind of properties are you guys working with?
Mainly residential lettings, some sales too
oh nice, so a mix. are you guys getting most of your enquiries through rightmove or is it more direct
Mostly Rightmove yeah, some from our website too
yeah that's pretty standard. what happens when those come in, like is it the team picking them up straight away or is there a bit of a delay
During the day someone usually gets to it within an hour but evenings and weekends they just sit there

yeah that's literally the bit that costs the most though. someone's browsing rightmove at 9pm, they enquire with you and two other agents, and whoever responds first gets the viewing|||most agencies we speak to have exactly that gap, the after hours stuff
Yeah we lose quite a few that way
makes sense. just out of interest, roughly how many enquiries per week are we talking

yeah at that volume even converting an extra few a week adds up fast|||so our founder Louis does a quick 20 minute call, basically just figures out if there's a fit and shows you how the agent actually sounds. no pitch, if it's not right he'd say that straight. want me to send the link?
